description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk featuring a flat, wood-textured tabletop with a natural light brown finish. The tabletop is supported by a sturdy black metal frame with angular, geometric legs that provide both stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The legs are joined by a horizontal support bar, adding structural integrity and visual interest. The desk has a minimalist design with no visible drawers, shelves, or additional attachments, making it suitable for a variety of urban environments. Its clean lines and neutral color palette allow it to blend seamlessly into offices, co-working spaces, or public study areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern rectangular desk with a light wood tabletop and black metal angular legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the wood tabletop and the angular black metal legs with a central support bar.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the tabletop and the single vertical support structure beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the tabletop and the geometric metal frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the desk's depth and the supporting leg structure.
attribute_orientation: The long side with the open leg space and central support bar is intended to face the user, providing ample legroom and accessibility.
